creator: danmcgrath.ca@gmail.com
text:
Well low disk space was close enough, although it was more low swap, which I suppose is technically a form of disk space? :D

It got me looking into the poudriere.conf TMPFS size, which was only at 2G. After increasing it (several times...), it appears to have finally pushed past the compile of ghc.

Thanks for the feedback! Closing this report.
